Appointment Flow

Complete frontend guide — visitor booking through check-out

HomeBook now

Visitor journey (public — no login)

Everything a patient or visitor does from the frontend.

Step 1REQUEST_SENT
Book online
Pick hospital, department, section, and doctor. Enter your details and appointment time.
Book appointment
Step 2REQUEST_SENT → APPROVED
Track status
Use your booking ID and phone to see if the doctor has approved your visit.
Check status
Step 3REQUEST_SENT → APPROVED
Doctor approves
Your doctor receives a WhatsApp message with appointment details and a secure one-time link to approve or decline.
Check status
Step 4APPROVED
Visit the hospital
On your appointment day, go to security with a valid ID. They verify ID proof before check-in.
Security steps
Step 5CHECKED_IN
Check-in & meet doctor
Security checks you in with OTP/QR. Your doctor is notified when you arrive.
At the gate
Step 6CHECKED_OUT
Check-out
Security checks you out when you leave. Visit duration is recorded automatically.
Track completion

Hospital staff portals (sign in required)

Each role uses a different dashboard page in the frontend.

Super Admin
Hospital-wide setup: chains, departments, users, and analytics.
Sign in to dashboardDashboard path
Hospital Admin
Manage your hospital site: departments, users, visitors, and appointments.
Sign in to dashboardDashboard path
Department Admin
Manage a clinical department, sub-sections, staff, and appointments.
Sign in to dashboardDashboard path
Sub-Department Admin
Manage your section staff and monitor section appointments.
Sign in to dashboardDashboard path
Staff (Doctor & clinical)
Review visitor requests, approve appointments, and track your visitors.
Sign in to dashboardDashboard path
Security
Verify IDs, check visitors in with OTP, view logs, and check out.
Sign in to dashboardDashboard path
Security desk — appointment day
Frontend path: Security Dashboard → Today tab

1. Verify ID — open today's appointment, enter ID type and number

2. Check-in — Check-In tab → enter visitor OTP or scan QR

3. Check-out — when visitor leaves, complete check-out to record duration

Go to Security Dashboard
